segments.text: Okay, let's get started. So hi one, my name is Jan, I'm a researcher at OpenAI, and I'll
be re-recording a class that I gave at the Berkeley LN Agents MOOC series on introduction
to training LMS for AI agents. So the reason why we were recording this class is because
one we had technical difficulties early on in the class, and second it was a fire alarm
that started, which means that we did not go through all the size, and also we don't have
a good recording, and I want to make sure that everyone who's online would also see the entire
class. So before getting started, one thing to say is that all the all views here on my own,
even though I work at OpenAI, I will mostly talk about things that we will we can find online,
and information that we can find of open source models, especially Kimi Lama and Yipsik. So unless
I talk about OpenAI, nothing is related to OpenAI here. Great, so with that, let's get started. So we
